title: Strength plugin
description: Gain damage with every kill and lose it when you die! Unlock Speed and Berserk abilities, withdraw strength into shards, and hunt global bounties in this high stakes SMP.
body:
⚔️ StrengthSMP
Strength is everything. In this high-stakes SMP plugin, your Attack Damage scales with your performance. Rule the server as a giant or fall into weakness!

✨ Features
🗡️ Power Scaling: Gain +0.1x damage per kill and lose -0.1x per death.
⚡ Milestone Abilities:
1.5x: Permanent Speed Boost.
2.0x: Passive Heavy Slam (Knockback chance).
2.5x: Berserk Mode (Invincibility via /ability berserk).
🎯 Bounties: High-power players are marked globally. Kill them for 3x Shard rewards!
💎 Shards: Withdraw strength into stackable items or craft them using Diamonds & Blaze Powder.
📜 Commands
/strength: Check your power.
/withdraw: Turn power into an item.
/ability: Toggle Berserk or view milestones.
Download and start the hunt! 🗡️🌪️🚀👑🔥

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28ac93c7767bf7cc3420ebf0f3fced3e601ba709.png)

The resource pack is needed for the recipe. [Resource Pack ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/strength-plugin-resource)
